title: When using filters to filter subitems, the sum of the non filtered subitems shoul be replected in the item
excerpt: I want to apply filters on subitems, so the sum of the remaining subitems will be reflected on the item. Currently, the “show summary in the parent item” is showing the total sum of subitems regardless of the filter.

posts.author: avivmo10 (Moshe Aviv)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to apply filters on subitems, so the sum of the remaining subitems will be reflected on the item. Currently, the “show summary in the parent item” is showing the total sum of subitems regardless of the filter.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @avivmo10

The app Rollup Subitems supports filtering (e.g. on status value) which subitem values are taken into account when summing them up to a normal monday.com number column in the parent item.

posts.author: avivmo10 (Moshe Aviv)
posts.cookedHtml: This App is not free. I think this behavieur shoud be part of Monday and requesting additional costs.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s true (being free was not on the list of requirements ) but it is a modest one time fee though. More importantly: it’s get the job done!
